1: SELECT CAST(`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) / CAST(`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) AS free_rate FROM `frpm` JOIN `schools` ON `frpm`.`CDSCode` = `schools`.`CDSCode` WHERE `schools`.`SOC` = '68' AND NOT `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NULL AND `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 0 AND NOT `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` IS NULL ORDER BY free_rate ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT `frpm`.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` FROM `frpm` WHERE `frpm`.`School Type` = 'Continuation High Schools (Public)' ORDER BY `frpm`.`Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT f.`CDSCode`, f.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` AS `Eligible_Free_Rate` FROM `frpm` AS f JOIN `schools` AS s ON f.`CDSCode` = s.`CDSCode` WHERE s.`EdOpsCode` = 'CON' ORDER BY f.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT f.`CDSCode`, CASE WHEN f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 0 THEN f.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` ELSE NULL END AS rate FROM frpm AS f JOIN schools AS s ON f.`CDSCode` = s.`CDSCode` WHERE s.`EdOpsCode` = 'CON' AND NOT f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NULL AND f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 0 ORDER BY rate ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT `Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` AS eligible_free_rate FROM frpm WHERE `Educational Option Type` = 'Continuation School' AND NOT `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NULL AND NOT `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` IS NULL AND `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 0 ORDER BY `Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT `CDSCode`, `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` AS eligible_free_rate FROM `frpm` ORDER BY `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT frpm.cdscode, CAST(frpm.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) / CAST(frpm.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) AS eligible_free_rate FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.cdscode = schools.cdscode WHERE schools.edopsname LIKE '%Continuation%' AND NOT frpm.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NULL AND frpm.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 0 AND NOT frpm.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` IS NULL ORDER BY eligible_free_rate ASC LIMIT 3
